Succession - TV Show Report

Zuzanna Uljasz

May 2026

An image from Succession.(Warner Bros. Discovery Pressroom 2026)

Overview

Succession is an American drama series about the wealthy Roy family, owners of the fictional global media company Waystar RoyCo. After the health of family patriarch Logan Roy begins to decline, his children — Connor, Kendall, Roman, and Shiv — compete for influence, control, and power within the company (Wikipedia 2026).

Here is a simple equation:

\[ P(A \mid B) = \frac{P(B \mid A)P(A)}{P(B)} \]

Another equation example:

\[ \mu = \frac{1}{n}\sum_{i=1}^{n} x_i \]

And one more equation:

\[ \sigma^2 = \frac{1}{n}\sum_{i=1}^{n}(x_i-\mu)^2 \]

x <- rnorm(100)
y <- 2*x + rnorm(100)
